scripts.setup: mise trust && mise install && npm --prefix 01_BOT install && bash -lc 'set -e; for dir in 02_EXTENSIONS/*/; do [ -f "$dir/package.json" ] || continue; (cd "$dir" && npm install); done' && mise exec lefthook -- lefthook install
scripts.test: bash -lc 'set -e; npm --prefix 01_BOT test; (cd 00_ARCHITECTURE/tests && go test -count=1 ./...); for dir in 02_EXTENSIONS/*/; do [ -f "$dir/package.json" ] || continue; (cd "$dir" && npm test); done'
